GetVendors: SELECT v.VendorID, v.VendorCode, v.VendorName, v.VendorGroupCode, v.CompanyName, v.PhoneNo, v.Fax, v.WebSite, v.AddressLine1, v.AddressLine2, v.City, v.Province, v.Postalcode, v.CountryID, v.VendorClassID, v.VendorCertificate, v.MainContactPersonTitle, v.MainContactPersonName, v.MainContactPersonPosition, v.MainContactPersonPhoneNo1, v.MainContactPersonPhoneNo2, v.MainContactPersonEmail, v.DefaultCurrencyCode, v.DefaultPaymentTypeCode, v.PaymentReference, v.RemittanceContactSameasMainContact, v.RemittanceContactPersonTitle, v.RemittanceContactPersonName, v.RemittanceContactPersonPosition, v.RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1, v.RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2, v.RemittanceContactPersonEmail, v.Activeflag, c.CountryName FROM tblVendorDetail v LEFT JOIN tblCountryMaster c ON v.CountryID = c.CountryID
GetVendorGroups: SELECT VendorGroupCode, VendorGroupName FROM tblVendorGroupHeader WHERE ActiveFlag = 1
GetCountries: SELECT CountryID, CountryName FROM tblCountryMaster WHERE ActiveFlag = 1
GetCurrencies: SELECT CurrencyCode, [Description] AS [Description] FROM tblCurrencyMaster WHERE ActiveFlag = 1
GetPaymentTypes: SELECT PaymentTypeCode, PaymentTypeName FROM tblPaymentTypeMaster WHERE ActiveFlag = 1
CreateVendor: INSERT INTO tblVendorDetail (VendorID, VendorCode, VendorName, VendorGroupCode, CompanyName, PhoneNo, Fax, WebSite, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, City, Province, Postalcode, CountryID, VendorClassID, VendorCertificate, MainContactPersonTitle, MainContactPersonName, MainContactPersonPosition, MainContactPersonPhoneNo1, MainContactPersonPhoneNo2, MainContactPersonEmail, DefaultCurrencyCode, DefaultPaymentTypeCode, PaymentReference, RemittanceContactSameasMainContact, RemittanceContactPersonTitle, RemittanceContactPersonName, RemittanceContactPersonPosition, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2, RemittanceContactPersonEmail, Activeflag) VALUES (@VendorID, @VendorCode, @VendorName, @VendorGroupCode, @CompanyName, @PhoneNo, @Fax, @WebSite, @AddressLine1, @AddressLine2, @City, @Province, @PostalCode, @CountryID, @VendorClassID, @VendorCertificate, @MainContactPersonTitle, @MainContactPersonName, @MainContactPersonPosition, @MainContactPersonPhoneNo1, @MainContactPersonPhoneNo2, @MainContactPersonEmail, @DefaultCurrencyCode, @DefaultPaymentTypeCode, @PaymentReference, @RemittanceContactSameasMainContact, @RemittanceContactPersonTitle, @RemittanceContactPersonName, @RemittanceContactPersonPosition, @RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1, @RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2, @RemittanceContactPersonEmail, @ActiveFlag); SELECT 1 AS Success;
UpdateVendor: UPDATE tblVendorDetail SET VendorCode = @VendorCode, VendorName = @VendorName, VendorGroupCode = @VendorGroupID, CompanyName = @CompanyName, PhoneNo = @PhoneNo, Fax = @Fax, WebSite = @Web, AddressLine1 = @AddressLine1, AddressLine2 = @AddressLine2, City = @City, Province = @Province, Postalcode = @PostalCode, CountryID = @Country, VendorClassID = @VendorClass, VendorCertificate = @VendorCertificates, MainContactPersonTitle = @ContactSalutation, MainContactPersonName = @ContactPersonName, MainContactPersonPosition = @ContactInitials, MainContactPersonPhoneNo1 = @ContactPhone1, MainContactPersonPhoneNo2 = @ContactPhone2, MainContactPersonEmail = @ContactEmail, DefaultCurrencyCode = @Currency, DefaultPaymentTypeCode = @PaymentTerm, PaymentReference = @PaymentReference, RemittanceContactSameasMainContact = @IsSameAsMainContact, RemittanceContactPersonTitle = @RemitSalutation, RemittanceContactPersonName = @RemitPersonName, RemittanceContactPersonPosition = @RemitPosition, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1 = @RemitPhone1, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2 = @RemitPhone2, RemittanceContactPersonEmail = @RemitEmail, Activeflag = @ActiveFlag WHERE VendorID = @VendorID; SELECT 1 AS Success;
